title: Mugget's Banana Jockeys
description: This pack turns pigs into rideable bananas!
body:
# Mugget's Banana Jockeys
This pack changes pigs to Banana Jockeys! With it you can ride your bananas in style!

**The pack includes three biome dependent variants:**
- _Green - Cold Biomes_

- _Yellow - Temperate Biomes_

- _Brown - Warm Biomes_
